description: 已批准出镜角色三视图，供 SeedDance 图生视频与脚本 continuity 锚定

characters.label: 女性角色-照护者-01
characters.wardrobe: cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers
characters.hair: light brown blonde high messy bun with soft face-framing waves
characters.relationship_to_product: prepares warm milk with portable thermos cup beside separate baby bottle
characters.allowed_use: on-camera caregiver in nursery/bedroom/travel lifestyle shots
characters.forbidden_use: medical claims, competitor branding, inconsistent wardrobe

characters.label: 男性角色-照护者-01
characters.wardrobe: heathered medium-blue crew-neck t-shirt, dark indigo slim jeans, white sneakers
characters.hair: short textured brown hair styled up
characters.beard: neat short trimmed beard and mustache
characters.relationship_to_product: handles portable thermos cup and baby bottle with realistic grip and pour physics
characters.allowed_use: on-camera father/caregiver in home and travel scenes
characters.forbidden_use: medical claims, competitor branding, inconsistent wardrobe
